results.title: Former Post & Courier executive joins Georges Media as Chief Revenue Officer
results.description: Chase Heatherly, a veteran media executive, has joined the parent company of The Times-Picayune and The Advocate as its chief revenue officer.

results.title: Stolt-Nielsen Limited to Host a Video Conference to Present the Results for the Second Quarter and First Half of 2026
results.description: LONDON, July 2, 2026 – Stolt-Nielsen Limited (Oslo Børs: SNI) will host a virtual presentation to discuss the Company’s unaudited results for the second quarter and first half of 2026 on Thursday, July 9, 2026 at 15:00 CEST (09:00 EDT, 14:00 BST) .

results.title: Goldhills Holding Ltd Announces Proposed Debt Settlement
results.description: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - July 2, 2026) - Goldhills Holding Ltd. (TSXV: GHL) (OTC Pink: GODZF) (FSE: GRYA) ("Goldhills" or the "Company") is pleased to announce that the Company proposes to settle outstanding indebtedness totaling $158,133 through the issuance of 3,162,660 common shares at a price of $0.05 per share (the "Debt Settlement Shares"). results.title: Hospital projects, health spending lift demand for B.C. medical office space (BC)
results.description: Medical office is a distinct asset class in B.C. commercial real estate that is riding the wave of higher health-care spending, aging baby boomers and major hospital projects, though concerns remain around new project viability.
